song_name: Try Sleeping With A Broken Heart

versions.song_name: Try Sleeping With A Broken Heart
Try Sleeping With A Broken Heart

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Artist: Alicia Keys
Song: Try Sleeping With A Broken Heart
Album: The Element of Freedom

Capo 1

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                  [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
Even if you were a million miles away[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
I could still feel you in my bed[/tab]

Near me, touch me, feel me
[tab]    [ch]B[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
And even at the bottom of the sea[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
I could still hear inside my head[/tab]

Tellin' me, touch me, feel me
[tab]            [ch]B[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
And all the time you were tellin' me lies[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab][ch]A/G#[/ch]  [ch]F#m[/ch]              [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]A/G#[/ch]
So  tonight, I'm gonna find a way to make it without you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F#m[/ch]             [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]A/G#[/ch]
Tonight I'm gonna find a way to make it without you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
   I'm gonna hold on to the times we had[/tab]
[tab][ch]A/G#[/ch] [ch]F#m[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]             [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
  Tonight I'm gonna find a way to make it without you[/tab]

[tab][ch]A[/ch]                   [ch]B[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
Have you ever tried sleeping with a broken heart?[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch]
Well, you could try sleeping in my bed[/tab]

Lonely, own me nobody ever shut it down like you
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]A[/ch]
You wore the crown, you made my body feel heaven bound[/tab]

Why don't you hold me, near me, I thought you told me, you'd never leave me
[tab]               [ch]B[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
Looking in the sky I could see your face[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A[/ch]
And I know right where I fit in[/tab]

Take me, make me, you know that I'll always be in love
[tab]     [ch]B[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
With you right til the end, oh[/tab]


Chorus


[tab][ch]F#m[/ch]                                      [ch]A/G#[/ch]
Anybody could've told you right from the start[/tab]
     
It's about to fall apart
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                                   [ch]B[/ch]
 So rather than hold on to a broken dream[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]F#m[/ch]
Or just hold on to love[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]A/G#[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
And I could find a way to make it[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]A/C#[/ch]
Don't hold on too tight[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B/D#[/ch]        [ch]E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
I'll make it without you tonight[/tab]

Chorus
